common.selectDisplayLanguage: Select the language used across the interface
common.storedLocally: Stored locally on this device for now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language used across the user interface.
settings.languageHelp: English is the only available display language right now. More languages can be added later without changing the settings flow.

hero.title: Build Inclusive Speech Data Together
hero.subtitle: Join a global community of language enthusiasts. Record, validate, and transcribe speech across multiple languages. Earn points while supporting language diversity and accessibility.

how.title: How It Works
how.recordDescription: Read sentences aloud and submit your audio. Earn 25-100 points per recording.
how.validateDescription: Review submissions and rate quality. Earn 50-200 points per validation task.
how.earnDescription: Accumulate points with every contribution. Redeem at 5,000 points for rewards.

why.title: Why Join CorpusWeave?
why.globalCommunityDescription: Connect with language enthusiasts from around the world.
why.fairRewardsDescription: Transparent point system. Your contributions are fairly rewarded.
why.impactDescription: Support language diversity and accessibility for all.
why.learnGrowDescription: Access resources and improve your language skills.

cta.title: Ready to Make a Difference?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of contributors building the future of inclusive speech data.

signin.subtitle: Community Speech Data Platform
signin.title: Welcome Back
signin.description: Sign in to continue contributing and earning
signin.supportNote: Sign in with an account created from the sign up flow.

riddleRecorder.title: Linked Riddle Recorder
riddleRecorder.intro: Record two clips in sequence: Challenge question first, then Reveal answer.
riddleRecorder.statusBoth: Both clips captured. Submit linked riddle pair.
riddleRecorder.statusChallengeDone: Challenge captured. Record reveal answer next.
riddleRecorder.draftSaved: Drafts are saved locally on this device until you submit.
riddleRecorder.errorNoMicSupport: Your browser does not support microphone recording.
riddleRecorder.errorReadAudio: Could not read the recorded audio data.
riddleRecorder.errorMissingClips: Capture both challenge and reveal audio before submitting.
riddleRecorder.errorSubmit: Failed to submit linked riddle pair.

onboarding.loadSubtitle: Preparing your language and contribution settings...
onboarding.title: Complete Your Profile
onboarding.subtitle: This helps us personalize contribution tasks and support accessibility needs.
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: Tell the community how you want to contribute
onboarding.settingsHint: You can update these later in Settings.
onboarding.errorImpairment: Please provide your speech impairment type.

signup.errorStep1Required: Please complete name, email, and password to continue.
signup.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.errorMissingConsents: You must accept every required consent document to continue.
signup.errorMissingCondition: Please choose your speech condition before continuing.
signup.errorResearchConsent: Please confirm whether you are willing to be contacted for speech research.
signup.errorInvalidCountryLanguage: Please select a valid country and language loaded from backend.
signup.errorNoCapability: Please choose at least one contribution capability: spoken, written, or validation.
signup.subtitle: Community Speech Data Platform
signup.step2Description: Step 2 of 2: Tell us about yourself
signup.canRead: I can read sentence prompts clearly.
signup.canRecord: Spoken: I can contribute voice recordings.
signup.canTranscribe: Written: I can transcribe text from audio.
signup.hasSpeechImpairment: Yes, I have a speech impairment
signup.researchContactText: I am willing to be contacted about speech impairment research opportunities.
signup.notesPlaceholder: Optional details that may help us understand your needs
